content.en:
The arrival of the Lord of the Wind Mountain represents the arrival of all the combat power of the Black Wind Mountain.

And the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord of the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord also came, after all, they were facing the Devouring Clan, they didn't dare to slack off, if they hid their strength at this time, if they were not careful, they would cause the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm to be devoured.

Once the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is devoured, the Devouring Clan will probably give birth to one or more domain ancestors.

Even if a domain ancestor was born, they would not be able to compete.

Therefore, they must fight with all their might with the Devouring Clan, so that the Devouring Clan will not have the opportunity to devour the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

Soon, the Devourer is here!

At this moment, many half-step domain ancestors from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, as well as a large number of invincible Dao Ancestors and Supreme Dao Ancestors, appeared one after another, blocking the Devouring Clan in the chaotic void outside the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

......

"The cultivators of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm reacted so quickly, it seems that they have been prepared for a long time!"

The Blood Emperor Ancestor was curious.

Of course, he didn't think much of it.

In his opinion, the cultivators had probably been preparing for a long time, and they didn't know what special method was used to detect their arrival, so they came out to intercept them as soon as possible.

It's just that to his surprise, the power of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is very strong and strong, which is different from the weak cultivators he expected.

"Blood Emperor Ancestor, be careful, I found four Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors!"

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor reminded.

"I saw it!"

The Blood Emperor Ancestor said in a low voice.

This time, they underestimated these cultivators from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and if they had known this, they would have let those Devouring Clans devour a large number of the universe, Dao Realm, and Chaos Continent of the Dao Mountain Realm, so that they could cultivate a large number of half-step domain ancestors.

In this way, their strength far surpassed that of the half-step domain ancestors of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

But it didn't matter, their half-step domain ancestors were still a lot more than the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, so they still had an advantage.

"Kill them, and then rush into the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm!"

The Blood Emperor Ancestor commanded.

Rumble!!!!

The Devourer attacked, and the two sides began to fight.

The Wind Mountain Mountain Lord, the Jinchen Dao Ancestor, the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord, and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord faced off against the four Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors of the Devouring Clan.

After all, the Jinchen Dao Ancestor, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master had only broken through to the Returning One Realm for a half-step domain ancestor not long ago, and among them, the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord was the strongest, and it was only slightly stronger than the Four Great Emperor Ancestors, and there was no way to kill the Devouring Clan of the Guiyi Realm.

And the Jinchen Dao Ancestor and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master are relatively weak, and they can't beat the Devouring Emperor Ancestor at all, so they can only barely compete.

The only one with a huge advantage was the Wind Mountain Lord, who easily crushed the White Deer Emperor Ancestor.

--------------

"A half-step domain ancestor who returns to the limit of the One Realm among cultivators!"

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor was shocked.

This Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor is too powerful, and from the realm point of view, he is also at the limit of the Returning Realm, but the gap between his combat power and the Wind Mountain Lord is too great.

In the last civilization era, there were also half-step domain ancestors who were at the limit of the Returning One Realm among the cultivators, but at that time, they were five or six Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors joining forces to besiege that Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

And at this moment, he is fighting against the Wind Mountain Lord alone, and the pressure is huge.

Soon, he was not lightly injured.

"No, if this continues, I will fall and die!"

White Deer Emperor Ancestral Road.

After the four great emperors, he is the oldest, the strongest, and the deepest.

The Devourer also has treasures, as well as hole cards, for example, he once traded an Arcana with one of the Devouring Clan's domain ancestors, which can enhance the Devourer's combat power, but it is a one-time consumption of treasures.

That supreme treasure contained the power of the Domain Ancestor-level Devouring Clan, once it was stimulated, his strength would skyrocket, and he had a part of the power of the Domain Ancestor, which was enough to compete with the half-step Domain Ancestor who could even kill the extreme of the One Realm.

"No matter what, I have to use it, once I win this war, I have a chance to be promoted to Domain Ancestor!"

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor thought to himself.

Rumble!!!!

A crown appeared above the head of the White Deer Emperor Ancestor, and the coercion belonging to the domain ancestor was revealed.

"The treasure left by the ancestor of the domain!"

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain was a little surprised, but he didn't panic at all.

"No matter how strong you are, you are not my opponent!"

The main road of Fengshan Mountain.

In the next moment, the Wind Mountain Lord performed a forbidden Dao technique - Wind Cutting!

Poof!

A ray of wind blade light tore through the void, and a single blow slashed at the White Deer Emperor Ancestor, directly cutting through the body of the White Deer Emperor Ancestor.

This forbidden Dao technique has reached the limit level, and its power has vaguely surpassed the limit of the half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm, and it has at least the attack power of the three-percent domain ancestor, so the White Deer Emperor Ancestor was not able to stop it, and was hit hard all of a sudden.

But at this time, the crown emitted a white light, and the injuries of the White Deer Emperor Ancestor were healed.

"Looks like we're going to get into a protracted war!"

The Wind Mountain Lord muttered.

The other side.

Ye Tian fought with the three Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, because there were only a dozen Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, while the Devouring Clan's Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors were as high as twenty-six.

Originally, there were only twenty-two Devourers when they first appeared, but over the years, the Devouring Clan had continued to devour the Dao Realm and the Universe, and as a result, several more Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors were born.

More than a dozen against twenty-six, the strength is not equal at all.

Therefore, Ye Tian single-handedly picked three half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

At this moment, he has not yet used the power of the Extreme Dao, just to paralyze the opponent, so as to find an opportunity to kill with one blow.

Time passed little by little, and these three Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors were not lightly injured under Ye Tian's attack, after all, Ye Tian's strength was also at the top of the Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors without using the power of the Extreme Dao, and these three Devouring Clans were naturally not opponents.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian used a trace of Extreme Dao power to cast the Dark Extreme Dao Spear, and a fierce blow pierced through one of the Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors.

Suddenly, the origin of this half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm collapsed and shattered to death.

The first place in the Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor has fallen!

Seeing this scene, the other half-step domain ancestors of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm were extremely excited, as if they saw the hope of victory.

I have to say that Ye Tian's strength is too terrifying, equivalent to a half-step domain ancestor of the One Realm, and others can't compete with it.
